general.title: Summarize Annotation Statistics [SPAC] [DMAP]
general.instructions: Calculates aggregate statistics for each cluster or label from specific annotation against selected features. To view the results, please click on 'Preview.'\ Please refer to DUET Documentation, and GitHub Documentation for further information.

parameters.name: Table to Process
parameters.description: Source table to perform the computation. Original refers to the raw dataset.

parameters.name: Annotation
parameters.description: The annotation to extract label info.

parameters.name: Feature(s)
parameters.description: Specifies features (e.g., biomarkers) for annotation metrics. Add multiple features by selecting "Add item" for each. The default 'All' includes all dataset features.
